{{Quote|<nowiki />''Millennium Falcon'' to ''Lillibanca''. Beacons are in place. You can begin. At Number One, if you please, not Number Twenty.|Han Solo, contacting the ''Lillibanca''|<ref name="Fury" />}}
The '''''Lillibanca''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that served in the [[Confederation Fleet]] in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Confederation]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] took part in the firefighting efforts against the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Fire/Legends|firestorm]] raging across the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in the aftermath of the battle. During these firefighting efforts, the ship targeted a series of beacons on the planet with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] blasts in order to ignite a controlled burn.

==Description==
The ''Lillibanca'' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries, communications equipment, and both [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]].<ref name="Fury" />

==History==
{{Quote|Acknowledged ''Falcon''. And thanks.|The ''Lillibanca''{{'s}} communications officer, responding to the ''Millennium Falcon''|<ref name="Fury" />}}
[[File:Kashyyyk_FFGRebellion.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Lillibanca'' assisted in putting out the planetary firestorm on Kashyyyk.]]
The ''Lillibanca'' served in the [[Confederation Fleet]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Confederation]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] took part in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]], during which the Confederation forces attempted to seize the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] from Galactic Alliance [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|forces]]<ref name="Fury" /> in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'', which include the aftermath of the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] and the ''Lillibanca''{{'s}} participation in it, in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].</ref> The ''Lillibanca'' assisted in firefighting efforts against the planetary [[Fire/Legends|firestorm]] triggered by the bombardment of Kashyyyk by Galactic Alliance [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|forces]] during the battle.<ref name="Fury" />

While the ''Lillibanca'' sat in low [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was assisting Galactic Alliance forces with firefighting efforts, contacted the crew of the ship via the Confederation communications frequency and instructed the crew of the cruiser to target a series of twenty beacons several [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] apart in sequential order. The crew was to target the beacons, moving eastward with a series of turbolaser blasts in order to ignite a controlled burn. Once extinguished, the burn would leave only char behind, thus depriving the wildfire of flammable materials and containing it.<ref name="Fury" />

During the operation, the crew of the ''Lillibanca'' nearly hit the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Solo's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], with one of their turbolaser blasts as Solo maneuvered wildly in an attempt to throw the rogue [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi]] [[Alema Rar]], who had appeared on his ship as a [[Force phantom]], off balance. The operation carried out by the ''Lillibanca'' proved successful, and [[Jagged Fel]], a pilot who had just returned from patrol, later reported to Solo and several others that the firebreak lines carved by the ''Lillibanca'' had held.<ref name="Fury" />

==Commanders and crew==
The crew of the ''Lillibanca'' included a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Unidentified communications officer (Lillibanca)|communications officer]] who handled communications between Solo and the cruiser.<ref name="Fury" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Lillibanca'' appeared in [[Aaron Allston]]'s [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'', the seventh volume in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series.<ref name="Fury" />
